title: Senior Plant Manager at Alstom India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Alstom India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
